name: Cart page displays items that have been added from inventory
description:
As a logged-in user
  I want to manage items in my shopping cart
  So that I can review my selection before placing an order
descriptionHtml:
As a logged-in user
I want to manage items in my shopping cart
So that I can review my selection before placing an order

steps.name: Given  a "standard" user is on the "login" page
When  the user adds "Sauce Labs Backpack" to the cart
And  the user clicks the cart icon
Then  the cart page should be displayed
And  the cart should contain "Sauce Labs Backpack"

labels.name: story
labels.value: Cart page displays items that have been added from inventory

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Cart page displays items that have been added from inventory
